a/ fas winna Dehleem pee-

"

    {

"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,

      "text": "Tew buhs ta Pilditcha-

"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad buhs Aâronam/ un

"
    },
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un teem buhs tahs Lee-

"
    },
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un ja fas atteek no ta

"
    },
    {
      "n": 35,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tew buhs tad Aâronam/

"

    {
      "n": 36,

      "text": "Tew buhs arridsan ikdee-
